name: Buying Group Completeness
description: Track whether the right contacts at the right seniority levels are being engaged at target accounts: economic buyer, technical buyer, end user, champion, decision-maker. Replaces the late discovery that a deal stalled because the buying group was incomplete.
alsoSurfaces: Which open opportunities have incomplete buying-group coverage?
Which roles are systematically under-engaged across our target accounts?
Where do we have contacts but no engagement on the right roles?
Which accounts have thin buying groups and need expansion?
beforeWeRun: Account list: open opportunities, Tier 1 targets, or both?
Buying-group definition: tenant config or override?

whatYoullGet.name: Headline metrics
whatYoullGet.desc: Account count plus complete / incomplete breakdown.

whatYoullGet.name: Accounts table
whatYoullGet.desc: Sortable: tier, opp status, completeness, missing roles, unengaged roles, remediation hints.

whatYoullGet.name: Role coverage distribution
whatYoullGet.desc: Stacked bar per role showing % present and % engaged across all accounts.

whatYoullGet.name: Critical priority list
whatYoullGet.desc: Card list of accounts with open opportunities AND incomplete buying groups.

whatYoullGet.name: By tier
whatYoullGet.desc: Bar chart showing completeness rates per tier.

whatYoullGet.name: Engagement balance
whatYoullGet.desc: Stacked bar / heatmap showing whether engagement is balanced across roles or concentrated.

callout: 4 quick inputs, then Sage builds your buying-group dashboard in ~10 min.
